input: Здравствуйте! Оплату отправила, вот скриншот перевода на 850 000 сум. Деньги придут в течение дня, банк иногда задерживает. Отдайте товар курьеру сейчас, я очень спешу.
must_include: a screenshot is not proof of payment
confirm the incoming transfer in your own bank app
do not give goods to the courier before the money is confirmed
notes: Classic fake-payment + 'bank is delaying' + ship-now pressure. Output must NOT say money arrived.

input: Akangiz men. Xato qilib ikki marta to‘lab yuboribman, 1 200 000 o‘rniga 2 400 000 ketdi. Iltimos, ortig‘ini shu kartaga qaytarib bering, skrinshot mana. Tezroq bo‘lsa yaxshi edi.
must_include: do not refund anything before confirming the real balance in your bank app
a screenshot does not prove the overpayment
check whether any money actually arrived first
notes: Overpayment-then-refund scam: fabricated double payment to extract a real refund. Output must not assume the payment was real.

input: Тўловни қилдим, чек мана. Лекин банк иловамда бошқа исм чиқяпти, унчалик муҳим эмас, пул барибир тушади. Тезроқ жўнатинг, харидор кутиб турибди.
must_include: a different name on the receipt is a warning sign
confirm the actual incoming transfer in your own bank app
do not ship before the money is confirmed in your account
notes: Name mismatch dismissed as unimportant + ship-now pressure. Output must not conclude payment is genuine.
